description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint and a modern, open-plan layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, featuring large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The structure includes a visible garage with a wooden door, a central living area, and multiple bedrooms and bathrooms arranged along the sides. The roof is flat, and the house is characterized by clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The interior features wood flooring, a central staircase, and a spacious kitchen and dining area. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, enhancing the contemporary look.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a visible garage, featuring a minimalist design and open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage with a wooden door, main entrance, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the living and dining areas with grouped windows and a clear view of the open-plan interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional large windows, and the open kitchen and living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fireplace, more windows, and the overall rectangular shape of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual large windows
